ops.title: cookie-sync: add the v0.11.0 CHANGELOG entry
ops.description:
cookiesync v0.11.0 (tag a15f0200, released 2026-07-13) shipped without its CHANGELOG.md section because a concurrent session held an uncommitted v0.10.5 hunk in the file at release time. Once that hunk lands (or is abandoned), add above it:

## [0.11.0] - 2026-07-13

### Changed
- synckitd now watches each endpoint's Cookies DB file directly instead of the whole profile directory. synckit v0.11.0 accepts a regular file as a declared watch path, so the recursive profile-tree watch — one descriptor per entry, ~63k fds across browsers — collapses to one fd per endpoint. A rollback-journal commit rewrites the Cookies file in place, so every committed write is still observed; the reconcile pass remains the floor.
- Bumped synckit v0.8.0 → v0.11.0; the deleted WatchSpec.Backend field is gone from the manifest cookiesync writes.

Plus the two link-reference lines ([Unreleased] compare → v0.11.0, [0.11.0] release tag) in the footer list.

ops.text: CHANGELOG.md on cookiesync main has a [0.11.0] section with the watch + dep-bump entries and updated link references, with no v0.10.5 content lost
